meaning: n.缓和,减轻,[律]在他人土地上的通行权(或类似的权力)附属建筑物,舒适,安心
examples: Give thy misgivings easement, good my lord.
As outright land purchases have decreased, conservation is increasingly becoming an easement business.
In 2000, another controversy erupted when the Owenses sued the county in a tax dispute over the conservation easement.
Depends on their central bank policy emphasis which politically feels to me like coming easement.
Close to 10, 000 acres will be covered by a conservation easement forever preventing subdivision.
